T0136.title: Offline App Promotion
T0136.definition: An offline extension of online fraud, distinct from legitimate ground promotion. In cybercrime, it involves promoting scam platforms, illegal products, or services through in-person tactics, such as offering gifts to lure people into downloading malicious apps that enable remote control of their phones for unauthorized money transfers.
T0136.description: An offline extension of online fraud, distinct from legitimate ground promotion. In cybercrime, it involves promoting scam platforms, illegal products, or services through in-person tactics, such as offering gifts to lure people into downloading malicious apps that enable remote control of their phones for unauthorized money transfers.
T0136.usageExample: 上个月在菜市场门口摆摊，送鸡蛋让人扫二维码下载那个假理财APP，后台直接开了远程控制，好几个老太太的银行卡都被划空了。
